Race: NONE
Decrepit Hide
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Ssetti
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 16:35:46
Page Updated:Sun Jan 23rd, 2022

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
an ashenbone broodmaster
an ashenbone drake

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

The Overthere
Quest Name
Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Hate

I was nervous about this one...
I got the port stone and went in to PoHate and buffed myself in there. I had Virt and Kei and then casted IVU on myself and went hunting for an Ashenbone drake. I soloed ONE drake and he droped the hide...so does this make me the luckiest SK on stromm?

Maymm 58 SK, Poetic Changes of Stromm

Innoruuk
▲ Page top
Best chance
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2004 at 10:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754776409
41 posts
Best chance to get the hide is to camp the ashenbone broodmaster ph; its always a drake and its on the same repop timer as any other mobs. He pops very close to entrance to Maestro of Rancor building and can be pulled there without aggroing any other mobs, just get rid of the only roamer than once in a while gets close to the door.


Koor

Sk of Torv
▲ Page top
MQ
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2004 at 5:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591795698528
2 posts
Can this be MQed. Just wondering. One dropped the other night in hate while I was there getting the rog book for a buddy. So I picked it up just in case
▲ Page top
RE: MQ
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2004 at 4:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1606090711584
128 posts
Teydar Says:
Quote:
'The object you desire is very difficult to fashion, nearly impossible, really. All I can offer to do is try. The real difficulty is the contents that give the sheath its power. They have to be of an almost equal evil. I think some kind of decrepit hide, a drake spine along with a bar of enchanted platinum should prove enough to make this item.


You turn in the Decrepit hide, the enchanted platinum bar, and the drake spine to him. I would assume it could be MQ'd can anyone confirm?
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2004 at 9:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592762199975
322 posts
A friend of mine was hunting these in the Kunark days, when they were new. Spent 6 months as the top SK on his guild's list for this piece when it dropped... once a day, for a few hours... for six months..... Nothing.

He took a day off. Two dropped, back to back.

he quit EQ for a yearand a half the next day.

Until he decided to "try it again" and got me addicted.... I hate him.

Edited, Mon Jul 12 10:00:04 2004

Drop Rates Changed
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2004 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261732703
9 posts
I spent many hours and killed hundreds of drakes before the zone drop rates were changed as of today. I go up there today and within 10 drakes I get my hide. Seems the drop rates was indeed changed or maybe I just finally got lucky. Either way I'm happy. Good Luck on your epic and keep with it. It's bound to drop eventually

# Mar 22 2004 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802020660
22 posts
Fianlly got it to drop last night off of an Ashenbone Drake. Was in house that Mistress of Scorn spawns in by cathedral. One also dropped 2 days ago while we were there for another group over by the angled houses where the Deathrot Night is. Drop rate just seems to be down in the 1% range. Good luck.

Hide
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2004 at 2:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802020660
22 posts
Been hunting in Hate since the revamp and I have never seen one of these drop. We are now hunting them more now for an SK friend who is trying for his epic. Few patches ago, the said they ADJUSTED the drop rate on this and some other drops. Have killed ashenbones and hatebones since then and still no hides have dropped. We have gotten at least 4 bones to drop for the Marsinger quest, but no dice. Good luck with this drop, you will need it.
